## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot IT access issues and discuss security measures for a new employee (Sydney).](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sydney's facing device compliance issues with Island (security software), including disk encryption detection and endpoint protection](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Copy-paste and file upload functionalities are restricted in Sydney's Island environment, impacting productivity](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Sydney recently gained email access but is awaiting approval for Craft access](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [IT support communication was initially problematic due to Sydney being removed from an exclusion list](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

## Topics

### Device Compliance and Security Measures

  - [Sydney's device flagged for failing posture check in Island](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Disk encryption is enabled but not detected by the system](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Endpoint protection (possibly Sentinel-1) not yet rolled out](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Jason confirmed with IT that for BYOD, some compliance warnings are expected](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Island Security Restrictions

  - [Copy-paste functionality completely disabled in Island environment](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [File uploads blocked, affecting access to Google Drive and potentially the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Sydney submitted an IT request to address these restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Restrictions significantly impact workflow and productivity](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Access Management and Onboarding Process

  - [Sydney recently gained access to Abnormal email (Tuesday of the meeting week)](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Removed from an exclusion list, causing temporary loss of Gmail access](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Communication breakdown: instructions sent to inaccessible Abnormal email](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Awaiting approval for Craft access from Jennifer (expected the following day)](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Sydney joined the Abnormal Slack channel last week](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### IT Support and Communication

  - [Jason advised Sydney to submit formal requests for access issues](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Discussed the process of requesting and approving access to tools like Craft](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Jason offered to send an email regarding Sydney's issues](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to follow up on the IT request submitted for Island restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Jennifer to approve Sydney's Craft access request (expected next day)](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Jason to send an email addressing Sydney's access and compliance issues](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Sydney to open a task related to the discussed IT problems](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Continue monitoring device compliance status and work with IT for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/NNXKVsRCCq32UVBeeb8Mfh3cWWmmsK8G?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
